workloads.name: Node ORT WebGPU vs Doppler Gemma-3 270M
workloads.description: Repo-only Node end-to-end Gemma-3 270M directional benchmark comparing Transformers.js plus onnxruntime-node WebGPU against Doppler on the same Doe provider with a tokenizer-accurate 64-token prompt and a 64-token decode target.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional-only Node receipt-first lane. Both sides reuse the same tokenizer-accurate prompt budget and the same Doe WebGPU provider, but the model artifacts and runtime stacks differ: ONNX Runtime plus Transformers.js versus Doppler RDRR. Use process-wall timing only and do not present this lane as claimable apples-to-apples evidence.
